title: Project — CV & Cover Letter
topics: CV structure · cover letter · job application · professional language
description: Projekt: napiš anglický životopis a průvodní dopis na konkrétní pracovní pozici.
notes: ✓ CV Profile: 2–3 sentences: who you are + key skills + what you're looking for
✓ Work experience: most recent first, use action verbs (managed, developed, increased)
✓ Cover letter opening: 'I am writing to apply for the position of...'
✓ Cover letter body: why you're suitable + what you offer + why this company
✓ Cover letter closing: 'I would welcome the opportunity to discuss...'
⚠️  British CV: include education, work experience, skills, interests, references
⚠️  American résumé: shorter (1 page), no photo, no date of birth

examples.en: I am writing to apply for the position of Software Engineer as advertised on your website.
examples.cz: Píši vám ohledně pracovní pozice softwarového inženýra inzerované na vašem webu.

examples.en: Managed a team of 8 developers and delivered the project 2 weeks ahead of schedule.
examples.cz: Vedl/a jsem tým 8 vývojářů a projekt byl dokončen 2 týdny před termínem.

examples.en: I am proficient in Python, SQL, and cloud platforms including AWS.
examples.cz: Ovládám Python, SQL a cloudové platformy včetně AWS.

examples.en: I enclose my CV and look forward to hearing from you.
examples.cz: Přikládám svůj životopis a těším se na vaši odpověď.

quiz.sentence: I am writing to ___ for the position of Marketing Manager.
She ___ a team of 12 and increased sales by 20%.
I am ___ in French and have basic knowledge of Spanish.
Please find ___ my CV for your consideration.

tasks: 1. Write your CV in English — profile, experience, education, skills (1 page)
2. Write a cover letter for a job you would like to apply for (150–200 words)
3. Research: What are 3 differences between a British CV and an American résumé?
